title: UI honesty audit — mockup-spec manifest
description: Data-only (no test logic embedded — P0-178-7) mapping of audited routes to (a) their source-of-truth mockup file under Plans/_archive/mockups/ (archived iteration-1 reference; web/ is canonical, per slice 437) and (b) the testid fingerprints the harness compares the live UI against.

route.description: Path the harness navigates to under the auth fixture's baseURL. Concrete paths only — :id substitution happens at test time.

mockupPath.description: Relative path under Plans/_archive/mockups/ to the source-of-truth iteration-1 HTML mockup (archived per slice 437; web/ is canonical), OR null if the route post-dates the mockup set (e.g. /calendar). When non-null the file MUST exist on disk (CI validates via the schema check + a file-existence step).

expectedTestIds.description: TestIds the manifest expects to see in the live UI for this route. Their absence triggers a SHIP-GAP finding (skipped for null-mockup routes).

allowedExtraTestIds.description: TestIds the live UI may carry without being flagged as a HONESTY-GAP — typically post-mockup additions whose backing slice has shipped.

staleMockupTestIds.description: TestIds the mockup describes that the slice owner has marked as indefinitely deferred. Surfaced as MOCKUP-STALE so the mockup gets updated.

notes.description: Human-readable context — usually a pointer to the slice number that introduced the route OR a parity-status note.
